surfaces.glassCard: bg-white/[0.02] backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/[0.08] shadow-sm rounded-2xl relative overflow-hidden
surfaces.glassCardHover: hover:bg-white/[0.04] hover:border-[#FF6B2B]/30 hover:shadow-[0_4px_32px_rgba(255,107,43,0.15)] hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-200 ease-out
surfaces.grainOverlay: pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-50 opacity-[0.03] mix-blend-overlay
surfaces.inputFocus: focus:border-[#FF6B2B] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FF6B2B]/50 transition-all bg-white/[0.03] border-white/[0.1] text-white rounded-xl

stats.counter: count up from 0 to final number in 1s

SearchBox.description: Two large input fields side by side (City, Niche). Glowing orange border on focus. Glassmorphism container with generous padding (p-8). Includes a full-width primary button with pulse animation.

QuickChips.description: Scrollable row of pill-shaped buttons for quick selection. Unselected: transparent with white border. Selected/Hover: Solid primary orange.

StatsBox.description: Three bento-style cards for Total Leads, Has Website, No Website. Large numeric counters animating on load.

LeadCard.description: Displays business info (Name, Rating, Phone, Email, Address). Left 4px colored strip indicates category. 'No Website' badge is red. 'Has Website' is green. Includes Copy Phone button and WhatsApp button.

SkeletonCard.description: Shimmer effect loading state matching the LeadCard dimensions exactly. Should use bg-white/5 for skeleton blocks.

ExportModal.description: Scale animation on enter, heavily blurred backdrop (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60). Options for CSV, PDF, Excel.

PricingSection.description: Three tier cards: Free, Pro, Agency. Pro is highlighted with orange border and soft glow.

ToastNotifications.description: Bottom right toast notifications with progress bar indicating time left.

icons.usage: Use strokeWidth={1.5} for a cleaner, premium look. Alternatively, use @phosphor-icons/react for duotone effects if preferred.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text on #080808 background meets APCA standards.
accessibility.focus: Visible focus rings on all interactive elements, preferably using ring-[#FF6B2B]/50.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion media query for scale and slide animations.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and setup Tailwind CSS with custom colors and fonts (Clash Display, DM Sans from Google Fonts).
Implement the grain overlay using a fixed div with the provided SVG data URI as background image.
Use framer-motion for all the specified stagger load animations, card stagger (80ms), and button scale effects.
Use 'react-countup' or framer-motion's animate function for the stats counters to count from 0 to target in 1 second.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes exactly as specified.
Implement the glassmorphism strictly using background opacity (e.g. bg-white/[0.02]), backdrop-blur, and semi-transparent borders. Avoid solid backgrounds for cards.
Do NOT use generic AI aesthetics, no purple gradients; stick to the hard contrast between deep black #080808 and electric orange #FF6B2B.
Category strip on cards should be a 4px wide absolute div on the left edge with background color matched from the categoryStrips palette in these guidelines.
Setup Google OAuth for the login and signup page.
Implement 'data-testid' on all elements described in the components section to support automated testing.

grainTexture.url: data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)'/%3E%3C/svg%3E
grainTexture.description: SVG noise for grain overlay. Set as background image on a fixed inset-0 div with opacity-30 and mix-blend-overlay.
